iteration_1_baseline.notes: Original skill (v1.1.0) with references. Model truncated JSON output — missing final closing brace on both files.

iteration_2_reduced_skill.notes: Stripped skill to essentials, removed references directory. Same truncation issue persisted.

iteration_3_compact_json.notes: Used minified JSON examples and explicit brace-counting instructions. Model still truncated final brace.

iteration_4_bash_heredoc.notes: Instructed model to use bash heredoc (cat > file << 'EOF') instead of write tool. Completely solved truncation. Added JSON validation step.

changes: Removed references/schema-examples.md (399 lines) to reduce context size
Rewrote SKILL.md from 180 lines to ~30 lines focused on FAQPage and Product schemas
Key fix: instructed model to use bash heredoc (cat > file << 'EOF') instead of the write tool to avoid Qwen3-30b's systematic JSON truncation bug
Added JSON validation step using python3 json.load()
Provided compact schema examples inline in SKILL.md
root_cause: Qwen3-30b consistently truncates the final closing brace when writing JSON via the write tool. The model generates correct JSON content but the last character (closing '}') is systematically dropped. Using bash heredoc bypasses this tool-specific truncation issue.
